creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
Update to version 5.1.8.  There hasn't been a formal release
announcement yet, but portscout has discovered the new version on the
FTP sites already.

Changelog is here:

http://dev.mysql.com/doc/refman/5.1/en/cj-news-5-1-8.html

Notes useful for people upgrading from earlier versions:

http://dev.mysql.com/doc/refman/5.1/en/connector-j-installing-upgrading.html
